site.intro: Lead Product Designer specialized in B2B SaaS products, with 15 years of experience in the energy sector.
site.heroDescription: I use systems thinking to align teams, structure workflows, and design more scalable product experiences.
site.seoDescription: Portfolio of Quentin Gillon, Lead Product Designer using systems thinking to design better decisions, workflows and scalable product experiences for complex B2B products.

about.seoDescription: About Quentin Gillon — Lead Product Designer specialising in complex B2B products, platforms, and design systems.
about.heading: About
about.bio1: I'm a Product Designer with 15 rewarding years designing B2B products in the energy sector.
about.bio2: Beyond interfaces, I’ve developed expertise in structuring workflows, creating design systems, aligning delivery teams, and coaching designers toward a more systemic approach to product design.
about.backgroundIntro1: My career has been shaped through complex products and growing responsibilities.
about.backgroundIntro2: Over time, it naturally led me toward a role focused on structure, alignment, and product leadership, working closely with teams.
